name: Chickpeas in Spicy Tahini Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook chickpeas in 4 cups water for 2 to 3 hours on the stovetop, or 25 to 30 minutes using a pressure cooker.
2. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Saute onion and basil until the onion is nearly tender. Add garlic and continue sauteing until the onion is soft and translucent.
3. Stir in tahini and 3/4 cup water. Cook, stirring constantly, until the sauce thickens. Remove the skillet from heat and set aside.
4. In a small bowl, mix the remaining 1/4 cup water with arrowroot, lemon juice, salsa, and tamari. Add this mixture to the tahini in the skillet. Add chickpeas and cook over high heat, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens.
Per serving: 372 cal, 15 g prot, 275 mg sod, 42 g carb, 19 g fat, 0 mg chol, 26 mg calcium
From: Vegetarian Gourmet - Winter 1993
